title: Lucid Group (NasdaqGS:LCID) Stock Forecast & Analyst Predictions
text: Simply Wall St's analysis of Lucid Group forecasts company reaching profitability by 2028 under base case assumptions. The platform's DCF model incorporates assumptions about revenue growth, cost structure improvement, and capital requirements. Key model inputs include Gravity SUV adoption rates, competitive pricing dynamics, and execution of cost reduction plans. The analysis highlights that valuation highly sensitive to profitability timeline and gross margin assumptions. Downside scenarios show negative terminal value if profitability never achieved. The model emphasizes that investment thesis depends almost entirely on successful execution of current strategic plans.
